skills.name: punkpeye/awesome-mcp-servers
notGoodAt: running anything itself — an index of unvetted third-party code (popularity ≠ safety; read before you install)
useWhen: the community index of MCP servers — tool-discovery surface for agent builds

integration.how: search it for candidate tools; read each SKILL/server before use; prefer ephemeral use over persistent install

skills.name: modelcontextprotocol/servers
notGoodAt: guarantees beyond its own README — verify against your workload before trusting
useWhen: the reference MCP server implementations — canonical patterns for fde-mcp-server

integration.how: wrap behind a thin SKILL.md with an honest notGoodAt; gate with an eval before recommending

skills.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
skills.oneLine: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.
notGoodAt: being load-bearing infrastructure — it teaches, it doesn't run
useWhen: learn-build-ship curriculum — course-design comparable for Objective 1

integration.how: cross-reference from course modules; compile its structure into the competency spine via knowledgefy

skills.name: langfuse/langfuse
skills.oneLine: 🪢 Open source AI engineering platform: LLM evals, observability, metrics, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, LangChain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23
notGoodAt: zero-ops adoption — a deployable platform carries real operational cost
useWhen: open-source LLM observability/evals platform — the eval-obs organ candidate

integration.how: wire as a swappable organ (eval-obs / MLOps seam) behind an interface — never hard-couple the hub to one vendor

skills.name: PrefectHQ/fastmcp
skills.oneLine: 🚀 The fast, Pythonic way to build MCP servers and clients.
notGoodAt: being a finished app — you still own design, evals, and deployment
useWhen: the fast Pythonic MCP framework — build-time dependency candidate for MCP tooling

integration.how: build-time dependency for hub skills (pin the version; probe actual behavior with one small build before adopting)

skills.name: modelcontextprotocol/registry
skills.oneLine: A community driven registry service for Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers.
notGoodAt: vouching for what it lists — distribution surface, not a review board
useWhen: the community MCP registry service — distribution surface for hub tooling

integration.how: publish hub MCP tooling to it; consume entries with the same read-before-run discipline

useWhen: open MLOps platform — enterprise-deploy cluster reference
